auth_config_env: --anonymous-mode CLI flag (present in default command; remove it to force per-user auth)
KHOJ_DOMAIN / KHOJ_ALLOWED_DOMAIN (required for admin panel / CSRF when exposed)

default_creds.context: Default KHOJ_ADMIN_EMAIL / KHOJ_ADMIN_PASSWORD literally shipped in master docker-compose.yml for the Django /server/admin panel; KHOJ_DJANGO_SECRET_KEY ships as 'secret'. Operators who run the quickstart unchanged keep these. In anonymous mode the admin panel is also reachable as the default premium user without these creds.

install_tell: curl -O https://raw.githubusercontent.com/khoj-ai/khoj/master/docker-compose.yml && docker-compose up  (pip path: `pip install khoj && khoj --anonymous-mode`)
misconfig_patterns: --anonymous-mode left enabled (shipped default) on an internet-exposed 42110 -> full unauth UI+API as a premium 'default' user
Default KHOJ_ADMIN_PASSWORD=password / KHOJ_DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=secret left unchanged -> admin takeover + forgeable Django sessions
Default Postgres creds postgres/postgres on the bundled pgvector DB
khoj-computer operator container exposing VNC on 5900 when KHOJ_OPERATOR_ENABLED=True

response_markers: JSON body with a "version" key and Khoj semver (e.g. 2.0.0-beta.x or 1.x)
/api/v1/user on an anonymous-mode host returns JSON {email, username, photo, is_active, has_documents, khoj_version} for the synthetic "default" user with no auth header
/api/settings returns user config JSON unauthenticated when anonymous_mode is on
X-Frame-Options / CSP referencing khoj.dev served by a Starlette/uvicorn server header
active_probe.false_positive_check: Title "Khoj" alone is too generic-adjacent; require a Khoj-unique co-marker to avoid the ~50% false-positive: the body must contain the asset host string `assets.khoj.dev` AND/OR the lantern favicon `khoj_lantern_128x128.png`, OR the JSON path /api/v1/user must return the documented field set {email, username, photo, has_documents, khoj_version}. A bare 200 on /api/health is insufficient (collides with countless health endpoints) — confirm the `khoj_version` semver field. To distinguish an anonymous-mode (open) host from an auth-enabled one: hit /api/v1/user with no credentials; a 200 with the "default" user means anonymous_mode is on (the finding), a 401/redirect-to-login means auth was enabled.

deployment_tells: Sidecar containers in default compose: pgvector/pgvector:pg15 (DB), ghcr.io/khoj-ai/terrarium (Python sandbox), searxng/searxng (web search), ghcr.io/khoj-ai/khoj-computer (operator VNC on 5900)
Favicon/asset host assets.khoj.dev, lantern logo khoj_lantern_128x128.png
Django admin at /server/admin (Khoj uses Django ORM/admin behind a Starlette/FastAPI app)
pivot_paths: GET /api/v1/user -> confirm anonymous-mode (default user, no auth) and read identity/version
GET /api/settings -> read user config JSON (configured models, providers)
GET /api/search?q= -> read the ingested RAG index / personal documents
Browse /server/admin as the default premium user -> view configured LLM/web-search API keys and server config
GET conversation/chat history endpoints -> read prior chats
Forge Django session if KHOJ_DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=secret default is in use
vulnerabilities: CVE-2025-69207 / GHSA-6whj-7qmg-86qj (Moderate) — IDOR in Notion OAuth callback: unvalidated state param lets an attacker overwrite a victim's Notion integration -> index poisoning; victim UUID leakable via shared-conversation AI-image file paths. Affected: <=2.0.0-beta.22 per advisory writeups; web-source claims fixed in 2.0.0-beta.23 (GitHub advisory page itself shows affected='latest', patched='None' as of fetch — treat patched version as unconfirmed).
GHSA-h2q2-vch3-72qm (Moderate) — Prompt-injection-triggered Stored XSS in Obsidian/Desktop/Web clients: AI response + user input inadequately sanitized; untrusted indexed/web docs can inject script.
GHSA-cf72-vg59-4j4h (Moderate) — Stored XSS in Automate (Preview feature).
GHSA-hq4h-w933-jm6c (Moderate) — IDOR in subscription management allows unauthorized subscription modifications.
GHSA-564j-v29w-rqr6 (Low) — Open Redirect in the login page.
ARCHITECTURAL (not a CVE): shipped default --anonymous-mode = unauthenticated UI+API; this is the dominant exposure for self-hosted internet-facing instances.
auth_evidence: PRIMARY SOURCE: the canonical docker-compose.yml in khoj-ai/khoj (master, the file the quickstart at docs.khoj.dev/get-started/setup tells users to download and `docker-compose up`) ends the `server` service with: `command: --host="0.0.0.0" --port=42110 -vv --anonymous-mode --non-interactive`. The `--anonymous-mode` flag is hardcoded into the shipped command. Confirmed in source (src/khoj/configure.py auth backend): with anonymous_mode True the backend short-circuits all auth — `if state.anonymous_mode: user = await self.khojuser_manager.filter(username="default")... return AuthCredentials(["authenticated","premium"]), AuthenticatedKhojUser(user)`. Every UI and REST request is silently authenticated as the `default` premium user; no login, no API key. The compose also binds 0.0.0.0:42110 directly. The compose comment block itself warns: "Uncomment the necessary lines below to make your instance publicly accessible. Proceed with caution, especially if you are using anonymous mode." A user who runs the documented quickstart and exposes 42110 to the internet gets a fully unauth UI+API. (Note: only when anonymous_mode is False does configure.py mount auth_router and return UnauthenticatedUser() for unauthed requests — but the shipped default has it on.)
sensitive_assets: Ingested RAG corpus / personal knowledge base: notes, PDFs, Markdown, Org-mode, Notion/GitHub/Obsidian-synced documents — frequently PII and private personal/work content (Khoj is a 'personal AI second brain')
Full conversation history of the default user (read + continue any chat)

Upstream LLM provider API keys configurable via /server/admin (OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, GEMINI_API_KEY) and web-search keys (SERPER, FIRECRAWL, EXA, OLOSTEP) — admin panel reachable as the premium default user in anonymous mode
Semantic search index over the user's documents (queryable via /api/search)
Agent/automation definitions and scheduled tasks ('Automations'), revealing workflows and business logic
Use of LLM credits / model access on the operator's dime (llmjacking) since the default user is granted premium subscription
sources: [CANDIDATE - NuClide Cat-34 rag-app-builders Stage -1 OSINT 2026-06-12; software-default characterization, no live host probed yet]
